summary: EXP-442 authored. Hole 2 contrast paragraph (§2b.1) replacement uses 4 templated placeholders ({{SC_TOTAL}},{{SC_MON_NONE}},{{SC_MON_HARDCODED}},{{SC_MON_HARDCODED_IDS}}) driven by wins.json verdict/code_analysis filters. Current values at HEAD: 20/12/8/{002,012,029,038,045,046,049,067}; previous prose said 14/6/8 with "for half of them." Replacement also drops the "half" phrase (8/20=40%) for explicit "N of M" form. Reuses list_of_winids helper EXP-441 introduces — recommend integrating both EXPs in the same cycle. Hole 3 (WIN-067 in §2b.1 line 13) self-resolves under EXP-441 and is not duplicated here. Required build-time invariant: SC_MON_NONE + SC_MON_HARDCODED == SC_TOTAL (strict equality; SC monitoring tags are closed at {none,hardcoded} at HEAD).
